expressions first of all i will tell you why to use regular expressions first of all you should not use regular expressions for basic matching you should not use it for basic matching because for basic matching you can use in keyword, you can check by using for loop there is no point yes i know you can check complex patterns by using for loop by using your brain and logic i have made regular expressions so that you don't have to use your brain and you can get things by using them to use regular expressions you have to import re package this is a built in package this is one step which i wanted to tell you you can import re module after this there are two things one is pattern this is my pattern and this is my text this is my text now as you know you can write python string in triple quotes now let's say i go to wikipedia let's say i write wikipedia and and yes i write anything wikipedia and copy it and paste it so this is my text i have written my text and there are many text in it this is my pattern and this is my text i have to search my text by using pattern means i have to see where is this pattern in my text so i can do this by using re package which is regular expression now how i will do this now see re.search has a function so first of all i will show you what is pattern let's say i want to find pattern i am saying tell me where is the pattern so if i do this and print match so it will not tell me where is the pattern but it will tell me whether there is pattern in this text or not so i will run this and see here it is telling that pattern is found and here is your pattern so in this way i can tell whether there is pattern or not now you will say what is going on what is the need of doing so much circus i can do this easily by using these keywords but how about if i make pattern little complex and here main regular expression starts now here i will define meta characters meta characters are used to make pattern for example i am saying search me here like here is written cyclone and here is written cyclone and here is written diclone now i am saying tell me where is written iclone which starts with capital means diclone starts with capital D and iclone starts with capital E and zyclone starts with capital Z search me that now you will say i will make my custom logic you will say this but you will say i need some time i have to think to reduce that i have to think i am making you to meet regular expression now what i can do i can say my first letter should be capital i can write like this capital letter should be and after this i should have iclone capital letter should be and after that i should have iclone so capital letter should be i can write like this and i will put r here so that it will become raw string i will tell you what is raw string so when i write backslash n it will print raw string and it will not parse so i have put a square bracket i said see from here from capital A to capital Z any character will work and after this iclone so this will work now i have made character class i said see from A to Z any character i know many people will say i am not able to understand from A to Z any character from capital A to Z small one will not work any character should come at least once what i want i want iclone so here you see plus means one or more occurrences so if i put plus here and i run it so you see here cyclone match but one thing is that cyclone match did not work i have to see why because re.search stops at first match now you will say i don't want to know whether match is working or
